query: MongoDB Atlas real-time analytics performance sub-100ms query latency 2024
answer: MongoDB Atlas can achieve sub-100ms query latency with optimized configurations and modern infrastructure. Real-time analytics performance relies on efficient indexing and parallel query execution. Best practices and tools like Performance Advisor enhance query performance.

results.title: Define Performance Options - Atlas - MongoDB Docs
results.snippet: # Define Performance Options. This section describes the options that you can use with the. `$search` stage to improve the performance of your queries. | Run queries that can benefit from parallel execution such as queries accessing different parts of a large dataset simultaneously and improve each individual query latency. | Return the documents stored directly on `mongot` and minimize the overhead of fetching entire documents from the database after retrieving the search results. results.title: Analyze Slow Queries - Atlas - MongoDB Docs
results.snippet: To optimize your query performance,. review the best practices for query performance. ## Performance Advisor. The Performance Advisor monitors queries. that MongoDB considers slow and suggests new indexes to improve query. ## Query Insights. ### Query Shape Insights. Query Shape Insights displays performance statistics for query shapes with slow-running queries. You can select up to five query shapes to view their metrics in charts, and filter by host, shard, and time range to monitor the most relevant performance metrics and statistics. Namespace Insights displays query latency statistics for collections with slow-running queries. Before you enable the Query. ## Best Practices for Query Performance. To optimize query performance, review the following best practices:. Create queries that your current indexes support to reduce the time. many indexes can negatively impact write performance. Consider the suggested indexes from the Performance Advisor with the highest Impact scores and. Create the indexes that the Performance Advisor suggests when they. The Performance Advisor cannot suggest indexes for MongoDB databases.

results.snippet: Most likely not as 6ms is not a time that humans can easily perceive. It's also unlikely to be the make or break feature. My recommendation

results.title: Real-time Data Analytics On MongoDB Atlas
results.snippet: With MongoDB, businesses can analyze any data in place and deliver insights in real time. By combining data from real-time events with historic and reference datasets, organizations can optimize queries to quickly deliver actionable results. ## Building real-time applications with MongoDB’s modern data platform. A diagram showcasing the various data sources used to create real time applications. Real-time data reflects what is happening now. With MongoDB, real-time analytics can be derived from multiple data sources — from basic aggregations to machine learning and AI — and stored separately. * ACID-compliant databases to ensure the ability to react to new data in real time and maintain high data integrity while serving many concurrent queries. Configuring and developing real-time analytics with high productivity — meaning less time wasted mapping data tables or coding single-use data pipelines — means you’re making your data a competitive advantage. * Offers a variety of efficient options for delivering insights to data consumers in real time, including change streams, triggers, and GraphQL.
